description: Check if Project Narrative is included in the application
New applicants with a co-applicant board: Check if Attachment 6 (Co-Applicant Agreement) is included
New applicants: Check if Attachment 11 (Evidence of Nonprofit or Public Center Status) is included

aiQuestion: Based on Attachment 11, is the applicant a private nonprofit entity or a public agency (including Tribal and urban Indian organizations) in the United States?
description: New applicants: Verify entity type from Attachment 11

aiQuestion: Does the applicant propose to operate a health center that makes all required primary health care services available and accessible in the service area, either directly or through established arrangements, without regard for ability to pay?
description: Verify that all required primary health care services are available and accessible, not limited to a single service or subset

aiQuestion: Does the applicant propose to make General Primary Medical Care available directly (Column I) and/or through formal written contractual agreements in which the health center pays for the service (Column II)?
description: Check Form 5A for General Primary Medical Care availability directly or via paid contracts

aiQuestion: Does the applicant propose to perform a substantive role in the project and not apply on behalf of another organization?
description: Verify applicant's substantive role and that they are not applying on behalf of another organization

aiQuestion: Does the applicant propose to make services accessible to all? If a sub-population is targeted, are services available and accessible to others seeking services at the proposed site(s)?
description: Verify accessibility of services to all, including non-targeted populations
Check if applicant proposes a service area announced under the NOFO number
Check if projected unduplicated patients in Form 1A are at least 75% of SAAT Patient Target
Check if applicant proposes to serve patients for each Service Type listed in SAAT
Check if annual SAC funding request does NOT exceed SAAT Total Funding for the service area
Check if applicant maintains current funding distribution (CHC, MHC, HCH, PHPC) from SAAT
New/Competing Supplement: Check if Form 5B includes service area zip codes where patient percentages total at least 75% or all zip codes if less than 75%

aiQuestion: Is at least one new full-time permanent, fixed building site with a verifiable street address proposed on Form 5B? If funding is only requested for MHC, is a new full-time seasonal site proposed?
description: New/Competing Supplement: Check for new full-time permanent or seasonal site with verifiable address in Form 5B

aiQuestion: If requesting PHPC funding, does the applicant demonstrate consultation with residents of public housing in the preparation of the SAC application and ensure ongoing consultation regarding planning and administration?
description: New/Competing Supplement requesting PHPC: Verify consultation with public housing residents in Project Narrative

aiQuestion: If requesting HCH and/or PHPC funding, does the applicant attest on the Summary Page that funding will supplement, not supplant, expenditures and in-kind contributions for delivery of services to these populations?
description: New/Competing Supplement requesting HCH/PHPC: Check attestation on Summary Page regarding supplementing, not supplanting, expenditures
If Form 1A patient projection is less than 95% of SAAT Patient Target, check if annual SAC funding request is reduced accordingly
Check if application is complete based on required documents in the Completeness and Eligibility Checklist

aiQuestion: Based on BPHC OPPD review, is the applicant eligible?
description: Verify applicant eligibility based on BPHC OPPD review
